name: Hundred Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the sugars and margarine until well combined.
2. Add the oil, egg, and vanilla to the creamed mixture and mix well.
3. Sift the dry ingredients (flour, salt, baking soda, and cream of tartar) into the sugar mixture and stir until just combined.
4. Gradually add the cereal, nuts, and coconut to the dough and blend until a stiff dough forms.
5. Flatten spoonfuls of dough onto a greased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10-15 minutes, or until golden brown.
